lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in poor condition.

The vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior is flawless with no scratches or dents. The interior is in pristine condition with no signs of wear. All mechanical systems are in perfect working order.

Bring this diamond in the rough back to life! This vehicle has seen plenty of adventures and is now looking for a dedicated owner who enjoys a project. While it currently needs significant mechanical and cosmetic attention, it offers a great foundation for someone handy with tools or looking for a budget-friendly parts car. Grab a bargain and start your next restoration project today!

This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior paint and body are flawless with no scratches or dents. The interior is in pristine condition with no signs of wear. The engine and transmission function perfectly, and all electronic features are fully operational.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is for parts or a major restoration project. The engine has a severe internal knock and signs of a blown head gasket, while the transmission slips significantly. The body has extensive rust, and the interior requires a complete overhaul. It is not currently in drivable condition.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been consistently well-maintained. The engine runs smoothly, and the transmission shifts effortlessly, providing a reliable driving experience. The interior is clean and shows minimal signs of wear, while the exterior remains in great shape with only a few minor cosmetic blemishes typical for its age. All service records are current, and the tires have plenty of tread remaining. It’s a solid, dependable car ready for its next owner.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents an exceptional opportunity for the discerning buyer. It demonstrates consistent mechanical integrity and has been subjected to a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure optimal performance. With a documented service history and a refined aesthetic, this automobile offers a superior driving experience and enduring value. We invite you to experience the reliability and sophistication of this professionally curated addition to our inventory.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and she’s been absolute gold to me. It’s in really solid shape and has plenty of life left for all your weekend adventures or the daily commute. Everything runs smoothly, and it’s been well-cared for over the years—definitely a reliable companion that's ready for its next chapter. I'm looking for someone who will enjoy it as much as I have! Feel free to reach out if you want to take it for a spin.

Offering a driver-focused E46 M3 featuring the iconic S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six with individual throttle bodies. This chassis remains rigid, having undergone essential rear subframe reinforcement and a recent VANOS overhaul to ensure optimal variable valve timing. The 6-speed manual gearbox provides tactile engagement, paired with a factory limited-slip differential for precise power delivery. Maintenance is up-to-date, including recent rod bearing replacement and a comprehensive cooling system refresh. While showing minor aesthetic patina consistent with its mileage, its mechanical integrity and high-revving performance are fully intact.
Used car. Reliable engine. Clean interior. Minor exterior wear. Title in hand.

This vehicle represents a fantastic opportunity for a driver seeking a reliable, well-maintained car that balances performance with everyday utility. The exterior retains a beautiful luster, showing only minor road-wear such as small stone chips that are expected from careful, regular use. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free; the seating surfaces are supple with minimal bolstering wear, and every feature—from the premium sound system to the ice-cold air conditioning—operates exactly as it should. Mechanically, this car is in strong health, featuring a smooth-shifting transmission and a responsive engine that has been serviced strictly according to the manufacturer's schedule. It sits on a set of high-quality tires with significant tread remaining and offers a quiet, composed ride. Included with the sale are comprehensive service records and a clean title, providing peace of mind that this car has been treated with respect throughout its life.

This distinguished vehicle represents a superior balance of performance and value. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it offers a refined driving experience supported by a comprehensive service history. Discerning buyers will appreciate the integrity of its mechanical components and the preserved aesthetic of its interior.

This vehicle represents a distinguished balance of performance and value. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it offers a refined driving experience for the discerning owner. Every aspect of this automobile reflects a commitment to mechanical integrity and aesthetic standards. We invite you to experience the sophisticated engineering and enduring appeal of this exceptional example.

Hey there! I’m selling my reliable ride and it’s been such a joy to own! It’s in really wonderful shape and has clearly been well-loved over the years. It drives super smoothly and is just waiting for someone new to take it on some fun adventures. I’ve taken great care of it, so you can feel confident getting behind the wheel. Come take it for a spin—you’re going to love it!

Used car in good condition. Clean title. Well-maintained engine. Interior is clean. Minor exterior wear. Ready for immediate use.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and serves as a prime example of reliable performance paired with classic styling. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, though a few minor stone chips consistent with careful road use are visible upon close inspection. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary of comfort; the upholstery is supple and free of tears, while every button and gauge functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, it is sound, having recently undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection and oil service. The engine pulls smoothly, the transmission shifts seamlessly, and the tires have plenty of tread remaining. This car has been garaged and kept in a smoke-free environment, making it a dependable and attractive choice for its next owner.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, representing a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, this automobile exemplifies the high standards of our curated inventory. It offers a sophisticated driving experience and remains in commendable condition, reflecting a history of diligent care and responsible ownership.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. With a documented service history and a clean profile, this vehicle offers a sophisticated driving experience and exceptional value for the discerning professional.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that's been well-loved and is ready for its next adventure? This car is in really solid shape and drives like a dream. It’s perfect for daily commutes or weekend getaways. I've taken great care of it, and it shows! Come take it for a spin—you're going to love how it feels on the road!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54B32 high-revving inline-six, delivering exceptional throttle response via its individual throttle bodies. Mated to a precise Getrag 6-speed manual transmission, the drivetrain is bolstered by a recently overhauled VANOS system and documented subframe reinforcement. The chassis maintains its surgical handling characteristics through refreshed bushings and a responsive variable M differential lock. Finished in a classic palette, this example shows honest road wear consistent with its enthusiast-driven history, but remains mechanically tight and performance-optimized for the next owner.
Well-maintained vehicle. Engine runs smooth. Clean interior. Reliable performance. Ready for immediate use.

This meticulously maintained 2018 Executive Sport Sedan offers a perfect blend of performance and luxury. Finished in a sophisticated Metallic Silver with a deep luster, the exterior is in excellent shape, showing only the minor road wear expected of a carefully driven vehicle. Inside, the premium charcoal leather interior remains supple and smoke-free, featuring dual-zone climate control, a panoramic sunroof, and a high-fidelity surround sound system. Under the hood, the turbocharged 2.0L engine delivers smooth, responsive power, complemented by a documented service history and a brand-new set of all-season tires. Every electronic component functions flawlessly, from the intuitive 10-inch navigation display to the multi-stage heated seats. This is a reliable, turn-key vehicle that provides a premium driving experience without the new-car price tag.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies consistent performance and reliability. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic presentation. A premier choice for the discerning driver seeking a sophisticated balance of luxury and proven longevity.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical reliability and aesthetic integrity.
